description: Style Note fastrack shows you how to move on with these slick shades. They provide a dusty outlook on the modern world. Hard wearing and rugged has never looked better than this. Wear these with a pair of light coloured trousers and an untucked shirt and you're good to go!Product Details Lens colour: BlackFrame colour: Silver frameFrame type: Full frameHigh bridge and flexible nose pads made of rubberMaterial and Care Remove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth providedRemove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleanerDo not use your fingers on such stainsDo not place glasses on uneven surfaces or heated areas like the dashboard of a car Warranty: 1 Year
